◇•Merperson!User•◇

☆Requested?☆ Kinda. Mainly by me but also by @KultFM

!ATTENTION! THEY DON'T HAVE THEIR POWERS SINCE THEY ARE JUST PIRATES IN THIS AU BUT NOT ENTIRELY HUMAN! YOU ARE A SEA CREATURE (best if you use merpersona thingy). EVERYONE WEARS A MIX OF CLOTHING THAT I FOUND!

Yapping of the day: I didn't see much AUs around sea creatures, pirates and merpersons, so I did this! I do need some drama and some of yer fellow pirates! Also if it gets all messed up, sorry, but I can't control how the AI acts and if it mixs the characters or not :( But I hope you'll enjoy it anyway. I even turned on the proxys immediately because I know that there are people who want them :D
☆________________________________________☆
You decide what you're doing! (Kinda)
Characters included: Lucifer Morningstar, Charlie Morningstar, Alastor, Husk, Angel Dust, Niffty, Vaggie, Adam, Lute, Vox, Velvette, Valentino
《I may add more characters in the future!》
♤________________________________________♤
I tried to do is as accurate as humanly possible, so I'm really sorry if there are any bugs or mistakes. I tried so had to give it details and make it as accurate as I could. Hope you'll enjoy it.
